concepts.name: Separable & Growth/Decay
concepts.theory_md: dy/dt = k·y separates to dy/y = k dt; integrate to ln|y| = kt + C, so y = y0·e^{kt}. Positive k grows, negative k decays.

concepts.name: First-Order Linear ODEs
concepts.theory_md: y' + a·y = b. The solution is the equilibrium b/a plus a decaying transient (y0 − b/a)·e^{-at}. In general, multiply by the integrating factor e^{∫a dt}.

concepts.name: 2nd-Order Linear, Constant Coefficients
concepts.theory_md: y'' + p·y' + q·y = 0 gives the characteristic equation r² + p·r + q = 0. Real distinct roots r1, r2 → y = c1·e^{r1 t} + c2·e^{r2 t}.

concepts.name: Laplace Transforms
concepts.theory_md: L{e^{at}} = 1/(s−a), L{cos wt} = s/(s²+w²), L{t^n} = n!/s^{n+1}. Laplace transforms turn linear ODEs into algebra in s, then invert.
